subcodes.first_line: O loved ones of God in Lahijan! The Wronged One hath presented Himself before the Wronged One and hath made mention of you in pure sincerity for My sake [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اولیاء الله فی لاهیجان قد حضر المظلوم لدی المظلوم و ذکرکم خالصا لوجهی
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @personal instructions, @martyrs and martyrdom, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
